channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Crypto spent millions to defeat Sherrod Brown and elect allies. It's ready for a repeat in 2026
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — At a five-star resort tucked in the mountains of Jackson Hole, Wyoming, the cryptocurrency industry was celebrating a historic start to the year on Capitol Hill. Its priorities were sailing through Congress with unusual speed and one senator did not hesitate to say why. Sen.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: I asked chatbots to find me cheap flights over the holidays. The results were mixed
item.description: It’s hard to believe, but we’re only a few weeks away from Halloween, and after that comes November—and the unofficial start of the holiday season. If you travel during this time, you’ll know that finding cheap flights can be difficult.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: The Indian WhatsApp? Arattai Messenger set to compete with WhatsApp as it surpasses 5 million downloads in just a few days, flying past Telegram, Messenger, and Snapchat
item.description: Arattai Messenger has soared past five million downloads, surpassing Telegram and Snapchat, but faces scrutiny over its incomplete encryption.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 US sales data for its first three months is in, and it's outpacing the previous record set by PlayStation 4
item.description: The PlayStation 4 sold 2.2 million units in the US in its first three months - Nintendo Switch 2 has just beaten that record.
item.dc:creator: Rhys Wood, TechRadar

item.title: Arizona sheriff’s office utilizing new AI program to assist with writing case reports
item.description: A sheriff's captain says deputies often spend hours writing reports between calls, but Axon's AI program, Draft One, helps them save crucial time in the field.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI first: The EU’s new AI strategy
item.description:
EU Commission President von der Leyen called for an AI-first mindset at the presentation of the Apply AI and AI in Science Strategy.
miss.cabul – Shutterstock.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Quantum computing – it’s still confusing, but now it’s mission-critical
item.description: "You're basically creating molecular circuits in the machine's memory versus connecting together a bunch of steps in a piece of software," said Bill Vass. The post Quantum computing – it’s still confusing, but now it’s mission-critical first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Ferrari reveals features of first fully electric vehicle, but its financial outlook mars the debut
item.description: Italian luxury sports carmaker Ferrari raised its 2025 guidance in the face of global 15% tariffs on foreign car imports to the United States as the company unveiled the new powertrain and chassis of its first fully electric production vehicle.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Barry, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Accelerating AI success with Cloudera AMPs
item.description: AI is moving fast, but turning pilots into production takes more than excitement. It demands skilled teams, the right infrastructure, and significant time. Large enterprises can often throw resources at the challenge, but most businesses are looking for a smarter, faster path to measurable AI value.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Cisco’s Michael Overstreet on securing IT-OT interfaces in federal networks
item.description: Agencies face rising cybersecurity risks as IT and OT converge. Cisco security solutions engineer shares strategies for visibility, segmentation and AI.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Greenland's leader hails EU as trusted friend and urges investment in its minerals
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — Greenland’s leader on Wednesday thanked the European Union for being “a trusted friend” and urged the 27-nation bloc to invest in his country’s mineral resources, renewable energy, airports and internet services.
item.dc:creator: LORNE COOK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Executive Survey: Amplifying federal service delivery
item.description: In partnership with Maximus, Federal News Network surveyed government executives and managers to understand how agencies are meeting these challenges head-on. The post Executive Survey: Amplifying federal service delivery first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Agentic AI – Ongoing coverage of its impact on the enterprise
item.description: Over the next few years, agentic AI is expected to bring not only rapid technological breakthroughs, but a societal transformation, redefining how we live, work and interact with the world. And this shift is happening quickly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: From pilot to production: How large enterprises can scale XR projects
item.description: Broad adoption of augmented and virtual reality (AR and VR) technologies remains at an early stage, but many businesses are already seeing value in the systems they’ve rolled out: immersive training for frontline employees, for example, or engineers who can collaborate on design using 3D models.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The best new features and fixes in Python 3.14
item.description: Python 3.14 is now generally available. This article presents a rundown of the most significant new features in the next version of Python and what they mean for Python developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Deloitte to partially refund Australian government for report with apparent AI-generated errors
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Deloitte Australia will partially refund the 440,000 Australian dollars ($290,000) paid by the Australian government for a report that was littered with apparent AI-generated errors, including a fabricated quote from a federal court judgment and references to nonexistent
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Google's Play Store shake-up looms after Supreme Court refuses to delay overhaul of the monopoly
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday refused to protect Google from a year-old order requiring a major makeover of its Android app store that's designed to unleash more competition against a system that a jury declared an illegal monopoly.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
